passives.name: Phreakish Gusto
passives.effects: {{tip|Turret}} basic attacks are modified to deal {{as|70% of this minion's '''maximum''' health}} as {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}}.

passives.name: Minion Damager
passives.effects: Against lane minions, this minion deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} on-hit equal to {{as|4% of the target's '''current''' health}}.

effects_structured.raw: Turret basic attacks deal damage equal to 70% of this minion's maximum health as pre-mitigation damage.
Against lane minions, this minion deals bonus physical damage on-hit equal to 4% of the target's current health.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Item page redirects to Caster minion; this entry models minion-only combat rule modifiers (turret-shot scaling and lane-minion on-hit bonus).
